div.p: Decision tree distinguishing page faults (valid=0) from protection faults (valid=1, permission denied)

text.tspan: // Success: update bits and return PA
// Success: update bits and return PA

div.p: Cause: Page not in physical memory Resolution: OS allocates frame, loads from swap/zero-fills, sets valid=1, retries
Cause: Read from non-readable page Example: Reading from write-only memory-mapped I/O Resolution: SIGSEGV (fatal)
Cause: Write to read-only page Example: Writing to code segment, string literals, .rodata Resolution: SIGSEGV (fatal)
Actions: • Set PTE.referenced = 1 • If write: set PTE.dirty = 1 • Compose PA = (PFN << 12) | offset • Return physical address
